title: Prepare for `--sign-by-sq-fingerprint`
body:
#2645 is now working and tested end-to-end, but depends on an unmerged feature.

This PR contains the required infrastructure / refactoring before the main feature, to allow reviewing / merging sooner.

(Alternatively, it would be possible to include the CLI code as well, with https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2896 , but having a CLI option that can never work seems a bit overzealous, at least for now.)

See individual commit messages for details.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
